title: Research: pi-mono architecture and provider patterns
description: Investigate how badlogic/pi-mono handles multi-provider abstraction and TUI-agent integration

logs.msg: Investigated badlogic/pi-mono architecture. Key takeaways: 3-layer strict structure (ai, agent-core, tui), tree-based session storage in JSONL, and a tiny system prompt (<1000 tokens). Documenting findings in ai/research/pi-mono-architecture-2026.md.
